hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(echo "$HOOK_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"file_path\",\"\") or d.get(\"path\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); [[ "$FILE" == *"llm/router.py"* ]] && echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"router.py was modified — run /vram-check to validate model assignments against the 8GB VRAM ceiling.\"}" || exit 0'
echo 'Session ended. Reminder: mark any completed phase todos as done in the plan file, and run /run-tests to confirm nothing regressed.'
